problem id: 498083ff
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  00000001 -> 10111011
  01000110 -> 01110111
  10010110 -> 01001011
  11010111 -> 01111111
  10100011 -> 11011011
  01100000 -> 01110111
  01101010 -> 11111101
  00000111 -> 00100011
  01100110 -> 11111111

query: 11010110
predicted answer: 01111011
